## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What workflow is painful or missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you thought about? Why is the proposed solution preferred?

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references.
